case_title: JAMAL ODTALLAH VS. JAMES SANG LEE

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ODTALLAH, JAMAL AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JAMES SANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ODTALLAH, JAMAL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JAMAL ODTALLAH. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT JAMES SANG LEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
